slides.heading: 5 Habits of Great Remote Workers
slides.description: The small routines that separate good remote workers from great ones.

slides.heading: Protect your deep work
slides.description: Block 90-minute focus windows before noon and treat them like client meetings — non-negotiable.

slides.heading: The 4 pillars of a solid remote setup
slides.description: Get these right and everything else gets easier.

content.title: Dedicated Desk
content.description: A fixed spot signals to your brain that it's work time.

content.title: Noise Control
content.description: Headphones or a closed door — pick one.

content.title: Hard Stop Time
content.description: Set an end time and honor it.

slides.heading: Over-communicate by default
slides.description: Send the update before someone asks for it. Visibility is a skill now, not a personality trait.

slides.heading: Start with one habit today
slides.sub_heading: You don't need a perfect setup
slides.description: Pick one tip from this carousel and apply it this week.
